column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Walking gracefully near a willow tree" | TEXT="柳が青々として" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at the river gently" | TEXT="水面がキラキラ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a wagasa (traditional umbrella) lightly" | TEXT="お散歩日和" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling softly at a passing boat" | TEXT="風情がありますね" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing to a small fish in the water" | TEXT="お魚いた！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Standing gracefully on a stone bridge" | TEXT="ここで一枚" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Taking a photo on the bridge" | TEXT="はいチーズ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Looking satisfied with the photo" | TEXT="よく撮れた" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waving warmly" | TEXT="こっちにおいで"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Stopping to tie kimono footwear (geta)" | TEXT="鼻緒が…" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking apologetic" | TEXT="待たせてごめんね" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Holding out a hand for balance" | TEXT="つかまらせて" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling purely" | TEXT="ありがとう" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up at the clear sky" | TEXT="雲一つない" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Taking a deep breath of fresh air" | TEXT="すぅーっ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding enthusiastically" | TEXT="いい気持ち" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Patting stomach gently" | TEXT="お腹すいた" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing towards a teahouse" | TEXT="あっちに行こう"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking surprised at a sudden gust of wind" | TEXT="おっと" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Holding down kimono hem/sleeves" | TEXT="風が強いね" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing it off" | TEXT="ふふっ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking slightly confused, losing way" | TEXT="ここどこ？" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at a map on phone" | TEXT="調べてみる" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a thumbs up" | TEXT="わかった！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Walking briskly with confidence" | TEXT="ついてきて" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Turning back with a wink" | TEXT="迷子にならないでね" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Showing an OK sign" | TEXT="任せて"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing softly looking at the water" | TEXT="落ち着く" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking a bit melancholy" | TEXT="色々あるよね" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Pouting slightly" | TEXT="むー" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Shaking head left and right" | TEXT="忘れよう" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Slapping cheeks lightly to cheer up" | TEXT="よしっ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling brightly" | TEXT="元気出た！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a gentle encouraging smile" | TEXT="一緒にがんばろ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands once" | TEXT="さぁ！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waving happily" | TEXT="行こう！"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sleepy sitting on a bench" | TEXT="歩き疲れた" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Yawning gracefully" | TEXT="ふわぁ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Stretching shoulders softly" | TEXT="うーん" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking apologetic" | TEXT="少し休んでいい？" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Sleeping happily on partner's shoulder" | TEXT="すやすや" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Waking up blushing" | TEXT="ごめん、寝てた" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Rubbing eyes" | TEXT="ねむねむ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Sticking tongue out playfully" | TEXT="てへへ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing gratefully" | TEXT="ありがとう"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Walking hand in hand" | TEXT="楽しいね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking back warmly" | TEXT="ずっと一緒" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling affectionately" | TEXT="好き" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Blowing a gentle kiss" | TEXT="ちゅっ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Blushing furiously and hiding face" | TEXT="きゃー" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Peeking through fingers" | TEXT="内緒だよ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing deeply as parting" | TEXT="今日はありがとう" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Waving goodbye until out of sight" | TEXT="ばいばーい" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking extremely happy" | TEXT="最高の時間"
